description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:latest Docker image and a before_script that runs `gem install bundler` then `bundle install`. Define variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Add a test stage with a job named test that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d test`, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME is not the default branch. Add a deploy stage with a job named pages that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and runs only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals the default branch. Ensure the pipeline respects the stage order test then deploy.
